visualization.title: Average Number of Credits by Course Type

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  course_type,
  AVG(credits) AS average_credits
FROM public.courses
GROUP BY course_type
ORDER BY course_type

visualization.title: Average Number of Credits by Course Type

result.sql:
SELECT 
  course_type,
  AVG(credits) AS average_credits
FROM public.courses
GROUP BY course_type
ORDER BY course_type
